hero.title: I build systems that {highlight} end to end.
hero.subtitle: 4+ years shipping production platforms — from automotive telemetry with Renault to clinical SaaS tools. Laravel, Vue.js, and a relentless focus on the details users feel but never see.

about.label: // About me
about.heading: Bernardo {highlight}
about.bio_1: Full Stack Developer based in Florianópolis, Brazil. Computer Science student at UFSC (Federal University of Santa Catarina). I started at a software house building ERPs and multi-tenant systems, grew into freelancing where I own projects end-to-end, and now also contribute to applied research at LISHA/UFSC in partnership with Renault.
about.bio_2: What sets me apart is {highlight}: I architect backends with the same depth I bring to frontends. I design the database schema, build the API, craft the interface, and configure the deployment. Every project here reflects that complete ownership.

d3t.desc: Software house. ERPs, multi-tenant systems, interactive dental charts. First exposure to complex production systems.

freelance.desc: EdTech platforms, clinical SaaS, payment gateway integrations. Full project ownership: architecture, code, deployment.

ufsc.desc: Automotive telemetry, Edge-to-Cloud pipelines, MQTT, CI/CD. Bridging academia and industry.

intro.subtitle: These aren't academic exercises or abandoned side projects. They're systems solving real problems for real businesses and professionals. {break} Click any project to see the technical challenge, architecture decisions, and {highlight}.
